_comment: Stance-order player gesture (#593): select the player Spearmen, hold-Ctrl+H to write the Hold stance on it IN PLACE (no move/attack needed -- the flash toast reads 'Hold'), then press I to toggle its intra-unit rank-relief (discipline) mode off (flash toast reads 'Rank relief: Off'). Both gestures route through Battle.enqueue_stance from PR #592 and are recorded/replayed exactly. drill mode: a solo rehearsal, no enemy needed to show a UI/hotkey feature.
